prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Performance 5.2L V8 (code: *Voodoo* - Coyote variant) with a Roush supercharger kit (2650 TVS) producing 750whp on E85, paired with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission and a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch assembly

Full custom exhaust system featuring 3.5-inch stainless steel piping with Burns Stainless merge collectors, MagnaFlow Competition Series mufflers, and a custom X-pipe with Vibrant 1799 resonators for optimal scavenging and backpressure management

Suspension overhaul with KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping), Eibach ERS race springs (800 lb/in front, 600 lb/in rear), and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) with spherical end links for reduced body roll
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Blackwood-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom vented hood featuring a 3D-printed NACA duct for engine bay heat extraction

OEM+ interior retrofit with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara inserts), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded chromoly) with bolt-in harness bar for track use

Exterior lighting upgrade to LUX H8 V4 LED headlights with custom CREE XHP70.2 projectors, Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro fog lights, and a full set of Oracle Lighting RGB halo taillights with sequential turn signals and dynamic brake lighting
